form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Not seen since winning won by 1.0 len this track January 2 over 900m defeating Grand Freude carrying 55kg at $1.50. form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 32 day let-up. Most recently held ground to the line 2nd of 12 at this track on March 5 over 900m, 2 len behind Fortitude carrying 55kg at $2.40. The race before that favourite; won by 2.5 len at this track February 6 over 900m defeating Sasakin Melody carrying 54kg at $2.90. Draws well and is a strong winning chance.
